title: reporting — data retention windows
description: Reports themselves are DERIVED DATA — regenerable from source modules. Purge is safe once the underlying data is available. However, EXPORT AUDIT ENTRIES (who exported which PII when) are retained for the full compliance window.

policies.description: Ad-hoc reports: 90d hot, 1yr warm, purge. Data is regenerable.
Attendance certificates retained indefinitely — career-timeline compliance.
Retained while enabled + 90 days after disable.
PII/Financial/Medical export audit retained 7yr min for compliance.
